title.en: Inside the NGV Signal: PPDU Format, Preamble, and Robust MCSs
title.zh: NGV 信号内部：PPDU 帧格式、前导与稳健的 MCS

blocks.en: NGV (Next Generation V2X) is the 802.11 PHY built for cars talking to cars and to the roadside at highway speed. It reuses the familiar 10 MHz channels of the older 802.11p but layers a more capable signal on top. The trick is that an NGV transmission has to be readable in two ways at once: a brand-new NGV radio should decode the whole thing, while an older non-NGV radio sharing the same channel should still recognise enough of the start to back off and not transmit over it. That dual requirement is what shapes the entire NGV PPDU — the over-the-air packet.
blocks.zh: NGV（下一代 V2X）是 802.11 为高速行驶中的车与车、车与路侧通信而设计的物理层。它沿用了老一代 802.11p 熟悉的 10 MHz 信道，但在其之上叠加了一个能力更强的信号。其中的巧妙之处在于：一帧 NGV 发送必须同时以两种方式被读懂——全新的 NGV 收发机要能解出整包内容，而共享同一信道的老式非 NGV 收发机也要能认出开头的足够信息，从而退避、不去压住它发送。正是这种双重要求，塑造了整个 NGV PPDU（空口数据包）的结构。

blocks.en: Read the PPDU left to right and it tells a story. It opens with three legacy fields any old radio knows — L-STF (short training, for timing and gain), L-LTF (long training, for channel estimation), and L-SIG (the legacy SIGNAL field). These form the backward-compatible 'envelope': an old 802.11p station sees them, reads the L-SIG length, and knows to stay quiet for the packet's duration even though it cannot decode the rest. After that envelope come the NGV-specific fields — RL-SIG, NGV-SIG, RNGV-SIG, NGV-STF, NGV-LTF — and finally the Data field carrying the payload.
blocks.zh: 把 PPDU 从左到右读一遍，它就像在讲一个故事。它以三个任何老式收发机都认得的传统字段开场——L-STF（短训练字段，用于定时与增益）、L-LTF（长训练字段，用于信道估计）和 L-SIG（传统 SIGNAL 字段）。这三者构成了向后兼容的“信封”：一台老式 802.11p 站点能看到它们，读出 L-SIG 中的长度信息，从而知道在整包持续期间保持安静——即便它根本解不出后面的内容。信封之后，才是 NGV 专属字段——RL-SIG、NGV-SIG、RNGV-SIG、NGV-STF、NGV-LTF——最后是承载有效载荷的 Data 数据字段。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 760 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12'><g stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='40' width='70' height='40'/><rect x='80' y='40' width='70' height='40'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='55' height='40'/><rect x='205' y='40' width='55' height='40'/><rect x='260' y='40' width='60' height='40'/><rect x='320' y='40' width='65' height='40'/><rect x='385' y='40' width='55' height='40'/><rect x='440' y='40' width='80' height='40'/><rect x='520' y='40' width='220' height='40'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='45' y='64'>L-STF</text><text x='115' y='64'>L-LTF</text><text x='177' y='64'>L-SIG</text><text x='232' y='64'>RL-SIG</text><text x='290' y='58'>NGV-</text><text x='290' y='72'>SIG</text><text x='352' y='58'>RNGV-</text><text x='352' y='72'>SIG</text><text x='412' y='58'>NGV-</text><text x='412' y='72'>STF</text><text x='480' y='58'>NGV-</text><text x='480' y='72'>LTF</text><text x='630' y='64'>Data (+ midambles)</text></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10'><text x='45' y='95'>16 us</text><text x='115' y='95'>16 us</text><text x='177' y='95'>8 us</text><text x='232' y='95'>8 us</text><text x='290' y='95'>8 us</text><text x='352' y='95'>8 us</text><text x='412' y='95'>8 us</text><text x='480' y='95'>8 us/sym</text></g><g stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='1'><line x1='10' y1='115' x2='205' y2='115'/><line x1='10' y1='110' x2='10' y2='120'/><line x1='205' y1='110' x2='205' y2='120'/><line x1='205' y1='130' x2='740' y2='130'/><line x1='205' y1='125' x2='205' y2='135'/><line x1='740' y1='125' x2='740' y2='135'/></g><g fill='currentColor' font-size='11'><text x='30' y='133'>legacy / backward-compatible envelope</text><text x='400' y='148'>NGV-specific fields</text></g></svg>

caption.en: The NGV PPDU (Figure 32-5). The legacy L-STF/L-LTF/L-SIG envelope keeps old radios aware; the repeated RL-SIG/RNGV-SIG add redundancy; NGV-STF/NGV-LTF train the NGV receiver; midambles sit inside the Data field.
caption.zh: NGV PPDU（图 32-5）。传统 L-STF/L-LTF/L-SIG 信封让老式收发机有所感知；重复的 RL-SIG/RNGV-SIG 增加冗余；NGV-STF/NGV-LTF 用于训练 NGV 接收机；中导（midamble）则嵌在 Data 数据字段内部。

blocks.en: Notice the doubled SIGNAL fields. RL-SIG is simply a bit-for-bit repeat of L-SIG, and RNGV-SIG is an exact repeat of NGV-SIG. This is built-in redundancy: control information is the most important part of a packet, so NGV sends each SIGNAL field twice. The repetition does double duty. It lets the receiver combine the two copies for a more reliable decode in a noisy, fast-fading vehicular channel — and the very presence of an RL-SIG right after L-SIG is the flag a receiver uses to tell 'this is an NGV packet' apart from a plain old 802.11p packet that has no repeat.
blocks.zh: 注意那一对“成双”的 SIGNAL 字段。RL-SIG 就是 L-SIG 逐比特的重复，RNGV-SIG 则是 NGV-SIG 的精确重复。这是一种内建的冗余：控制信息是一个包里最重要的部分，所以 NGV 把每个 SIGNAL 字段都发两遍。这种重复一举两得。它让接收机可以把两份拷贝合并，从而在嘈杂、快衰落的车载信道中获得更可靠的解码；而紧跟在 L-SIG 之后出现的 RL-SIG，本身就是接收机用来区分“这是一帧 NGV 包”与“一帧没有重复字段的普通 802.11p 包”的标志。

blocks.en: The NGV-SIG field is tiny but pivotal: a single OFDM symbol carrying just 24 bits (BCC-coded at rate 1/2, plain BPSK). Those bits announce the bandwidth (10 or 20 MHz), the NGV-MCS, how many spatial streams, the LTF format, and — crucially — the midamble periodicity. Everything the receiver needs to set itself up for the Data field is packed into that one rugged symbol, and then repeated as RNGV-SIG for safety.
blocks.zh: NGV-SIG 字段虽小却至关重要：它只是单个 OFDM 符号，仅携带 24 个比特（以 1/2 码率做 BCC 编码、普通 BPSK 调制）。这些比特宣告了带宽（10 或 20 MHz）、NGV-MCS、空间流数、LTF 格式，以及——关键的——中导周期（midamble periodicity）。接收机为解 Data 字段所做准备所需的一切，都被塞进了这一个稳健的符号里，随后再以 RNGV-SIG 重复一遍以策万全。

blocks.en: Now look inside the Data field, where midambles live. A car at 120 km/h sees the radio channel change within a single packet, so a channel estimate taken from the preamble at the start goes stale halfway through. NGV's answer is to sprinkle midambles — extra training symbols, identical in format to the NGV-LTF — every M data symbols, where M is 4, 8, or 16 (signalled by that midamble-periodicity field in NGV-SIG). Each midamble lets the receiver re-measure the channel mid-packet and keep equalising correctly. The faster the channel changes, the smaller M you choose.
blocks.zh: 现在看看 Data 字段内部——中导（midamble）就住在这里。一辆时速 120 公里的车，会在一个包的时间内就感受到无线信道发生变化，于是开头从前导里取得的信道估计，到包的中段就已经“过期”了。NGV 的应对之道，是每隔 M 个数据符号就撒入一个中导——它是与 NGV-LTF 格式完全相同的额外训练符号，M 取 4、8 或 16（由 NGV-SIG 中的那个中导周期字段指示）。每个中导都让接收机在包的中途重新测量一次信道，从而持续正确地做均衡。信道变化越快，你就选越小的 M。

blocks.en:
graph LR
    P[NGV preamble] --> D1[M data symbols]
    D1 --> M1[midamble]
    M1 --> D2[M data symbols]
    D2 --> M2[midamble]
    M2 --> D3[... more data ...]
    classDef mid stroke-dasharray:4 4;
    class M1,M2 mid;
blocks.zh:
graph LR
    P[NGV 前导] --> D1[M 个数据符号]
    D1 --> M1[中导]
    M1 --> D2[M 个数据符号]
    D2 --> M2[中导]
    M2 --> D3[... 更多数据 ...]
    classDef mid stroke-dasharray:4 4;
    class M1,M2 mid;

blocks.en: Finally, why does NGV lean toward rugged, low-order MCSs rather than chasing raw speed? Because reliability beats peak throughput when a missed safety message could mean a collision. The NGV-MCS set runs from index 0 (BPSK, rate 1/2 — about 3.3 Mb/s in a 10 MHz channel) up through QPSK, 16-QAM, 64-QAM to 256-QAM, but the workhorses for V2X are the low end. There is even an extra-rugged mode, NGV-MCS 15, which uses BPSK with dual-carrier modulation (BPSK-DCM): it sends each bit on two subcarriers for frequency diversity, trading rate (down to ~1.6 Mb/s) for the ability to survive a hostile channel.
blocks.zh: 最后，NGV 为何偏向稳健的低阶 MCS，而不是一味追求原始速率？因为当一条漏掉的安全消息可能意味着一场碰撞时，可靠性要胜过峰值吞吐。NGV-MCS 集合从索引 0（BPSK，码率 1/2——在 10 MHz 信道中约 3.3 Mb/s）一路经 QPSK、16-QAM、64-QAM 直到 256-QAM，但 V2X 的主力是低端那几档。它甚至还有一个格外稳健的模式 NGV-MCS 15，使用带双载波调制的 BPSK（BPSK-DCM）：它把每个比特发到两个子载波上以获得频率分集，用速率（降到约 1.6 Mb/s）换取在恶劣信道中“活下来”的能力。

summary.en: What the standard actually says about the fields and the MCS set
summary.zh: 标准对这些字段与 MCS 集合的确切规定

blocks.en: Clause 32.3.2 defines a single PPDU format whose fields (Table 32-5, Figure 32-5) are L-STF, L-LTF, L-SIG, RL-SIG, NGV-SIG, RNGV-SIG, NGV-STF, NGV-LTF, and Data; the RL-SIG, NGV-SIG, RNGV-SIG, NGV-STF and NGV-LTF fields appear only in NGV PPDUs, and 'the RNGV-SIG field is equal to NGV-SIG field.' Clause 32.3.4.5 specifies the NGV-SIG as one OFDM symbol of 24 uncoded bits — including reserved bits, a CRC, and tail bits — BCC-encoded at R=1/2, BCC-interleaved, then BPSK-mapped; RNGV-SIG is constructed by the same process, and the same interleaver is applied so the two baseband symbols are exactly the same. Clause 32.3.9.9 states an NGV STA includes midambles when the number of midamble periods N_MA > 0; they appear in the Data field every M = 4, 8, or 16 OFDM symbols per the Midamble Periodicity field, use the same format as that PPDU's NGV-LTF, and 'facilitate updating of the channel estimate during the NGV PPDU reception.' Clause 32.3.5 defines the NGV-MCS as the value carried in NGV-SIG/RNGV-SIG that sets the Data-field modulation and coding; rate-dependent parameters span NGV-MCS 0–15 (Tables 32-21 to 32-24), with BPSK-DCM signalled as NGV-MCS 15.
blocks.zh: 32.3.2 节定义了唯一的一种 PPDU 格式，其字段（表 32-5、图 32-5）为 L-STF、L-LTF、L-SIG、RL-SIG、NGV-SIG、RNGV-SIG、NGV-STF、NGV-LTF 与 Data；其中 RL-SIG、NGV-SIG、RNGV-SIG、NGV-STF 与 NGV-LTF 仅出现在 NGV PPDU 中，且“RNGV-SIG 字段等于 NGV-SIG 字段”。32.3.4.5 节规定 NGV-SIG 为单个 OFDM 符号、含 24 个未编码比特（包括保留位、一个 CRC 和尾比特），以 R=1/2 做 BCC 编码、经 BCC 交织、再做 BPSK 映射；RNGV-SIG 以相同流程构造，并施加相同的交织器，使两个基带符号完全一致。32.3.9.9 节规定：当中导周期数 N_MA > 0 时，NGV 站点须包含中导；中导按中导周期字段每隔 M = 4、8 或 16 个 OFDM 符号出现在 Data 字段中，采用与该 PPDU 的 NGV-LTF 相同的格式，并“在 NGV PPDU 接收过程中辅助更新信道估计”。32.3.5 节将 NGV-MCS 定义为承载于 NGV-SIG/RNGV-SIG 中、用以确定 Data 字段调制与编码的值；其速率相关参数覆盖 NGV-MCS 0–15（表 32-21 至 32-24），而 BPSK-DCM 以 NGV-MCS 15 表示。

cites.note: 32.3.2 NGV PPDU format — Table 32-5 / Figure 32-5 field list and durations; NGV-only fields; RNGV-SIG = NGV-SIG
32.3.4.5 Construction of NGV-SIG and RNGV-SIG — 24 bits, BCC R=1/2, BPSK; RNGV-SIG identical repeat
32.3.5 NGV modulation and coding schemes — NGV-MCS carried in NGV-SIG/RNGV-SIG; MCS 0-15; BPSK-DCM = MCS 15
32.3.9.9 Midambles — present every M=4/8/16 symbols; same format as NGV-LTF; update channel estimate mid-PPDU
